symptoms: Irregular periods (cycles 35–65 days); Moderate pelvic pain; Acne; Mild hirsutism; Fatigue; Bloating
medications: Metformin 500mg Twice daily; Combined oral contraceptive pill Once daily; Iron supplement 65mg Once daily; Vitex agnus-castus 400mg Once daily
notes: Initial PCOS work-up. AMH elevated at 8.2 ng/mL. Ultrasound confirms polycystic ovaries bilaterally. Insulin resistance pattern noted. Patient counselled on lifestyle modifications and weight management. Referral to dietitian placed.
diagnosis: Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS); Iron-deficiency anaemia; Insulin resistance
recommendations: Low-glycaemic-index diet; 150 minutes aerobic exercise per week; Continue daily iron supplementation; Track menstrual cycle with app; Reduce refined carbohydrates; Follow-up in 3 months
